def: A dog used in hunting the wild boar; a leamer. Spenser.
To envelop in a wet or dry sheet, within numerous coverings.See Pack, n., 5.
The state or quality of being accurate; accuracy; exactness;nicety; precision.
The act of permitting; allowance; permission; leave. Milton.
Pertaining to the Muse Erato who presided over amatory poetry.Stormonth.
Barium carbonate occurring in white or gray six-sided twincrystals, and also in columnar or granular masses.

A classification of nouns, primarily according to sex; andsecondarily according to some fancied or imputed quality associatedwith sex.Gender is a grammatical distinction and applies to words only. Sex isnatural distinction and applies to living objects. R. Morris.
